summary: A Node.js-based tool that downloads complete website source code, including HTML, JavaScripts, stylesheets, and assets, enabling offline access or archival of web content.
usecases: Web developers archiving competitor websites for analysis or backup purposes
Educators creating offline copies of online courses or tutorials for classroom use
Digital preservationists saving historical websites before they become inaccessible
ideas: Integrate with browser extensions to download entire tabs with a single click
Add AI-powered asset optimization to reduce storage size of downloaded websites
Create a decentralized version that uses IPFS for sharing archived websites peer-to-peer
